{{Infobox location
| name = Axciss
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Axciss Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Axciss is a major city located on the [[Izyrian continent]]. It is famously known as the City of [[Champions]] and serves as the headquarters for the [[Champion’s Guild]]. The city is a significant hub for gladiator arenas, which are highly popular sporting venues for the local population. These combat arenas serve various social and legal functions; for instance, certain criminals are sentenced to fight in the [[arena]] as a method of generating revenue for the [[Aurelian Empire]] while they await execution. While there is debate regarding whether the presence of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] caused the prevalence of fighters or if the [[Guild]] settled there specifically to capitalize on the combat culture, the city remains a central location for such activities.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Located on the [[Izyrian continent]], Axciss is known as the City of [[Champions]]. The city features a gladiator's [[arena]] that serves as a site where criminals are sentenced to death. Upon reaching the city, which was three days away from [[Calder]]'s position, the crew visited this [[arena]]. Following an explosion at the site, a hunt for unregistered alchemists was set to take place within Axciss, where [[Calder]] and [[Jerri]] possessed very few acquaintances.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Axciss]] is the City of [[Champions]] located on the [[Izyrian continent]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Axciss]] contains a gladiator's [[arena]] where criminals are sentenced to death.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] and [[Jerri]] have few acquaintances in [[Axciss]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Axciss]] is a city in [[Izyria]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Axciss]] is a location where there will be a hunt for unregistered alchemists following an explosion at the [[arena]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The crew visited the [[arena]] upon reaching [[Axciss]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Axciss]] is a location located three days from [[Calder]]'s current position.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Axciss]] is a location mentioned by the old man.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nakothi]] has choices from [[Axciss]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Rebels are active in [[Axciss]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Axciss]] is a location.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The situation in [[Axciss]] was described as urgent.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
